Canberra Raiders 30 def. Warriors 8

  • Summary
  • Stats
2025 Telstra NRL Premiership
Round 1
Canberra
Raiders		 30
–
8
Warriors
Match Info
Match URL www.rugbyleagueproject.org/matches/103171
Status Completed
Date Saturday, 1st March, 2025
Kick Off 4:00pm (local time)
Referee Grant Atkins
Touch Judges David Munro, Phil Henderson
Sr. Review Gerard Sutton (Coonabarabran)
Venue Allegiant (Las Vegas)
Crowd 45,209
Match Stats
Halftime Score 16 – 4
Penalties 5 – 7
Canberra Scoresheet Warriors
Sebastian KRIS 2 T Kurt CAPEWELL
Xavier SAVAGE 2   Roger TUIVASA-SHECK
Matthew TIMOKO      
 
Jamal FOGARTY 5/6 G 0/2 Luke METCALF
 
Joseph TAPINE BIN    
Canberra Teams Warriors
Kaeo WEEKES 1 FB 1 Charnze NICOLL-KLOKSTAD
Savelio TAMALE 2 W 2 Taine TUAUPIKI
Matthew TIMOKO 3 C 3 Ali LEIATAUA
Sebastian KRIS 4 C 4 Adam POMPEY
Xavier SAVAGE 5 W 5 Roger TUIVASA-SHECK
 
Ethan STRANGE 6 FE 6 Chanel HARRIS-TAVITA
Jamal FOGARTY 7 HB 7 Luke METCALF
 
Corey HORSBURGH 8 FR 8 James FISHER-HARRIS (c)
Tom STARLING 9 HK 9 Wayde EGAN
Joseph TAPINE (c) 10 FR 15 Jackson FORD
Hudson YOUNG 11 2R 11 Kurt CAPEWELL
Zac HOSKING 12 2R 12 Marata NIUKORE
Josh PAPALII 16 L 10 Mitchell BARNETT
 
Morgan SMITHIES 13 B 13 Erin CLARK
Owen PATTIE 14 B 14 Dylan WALKER
Simi SASAGI 15 B 16 Demitric VAIMAUGA
Ata MARIOTA 17 B 17 Selumiela HALASIMA
 
Ricky STUART   HC   Andrew WEBSTER
   
 

Team Info

Canberra

Previous Game:
2025 Witzer NRL Pre-Season Challenge - Round 2 vs. Cronulla
Next Game:
Round 2 vs. Brisbane
Out:
Trey Mooney (front row), Matty Nicholson (second row), Danny Levi (bench), Albert Hopoate (bench), Adam Cook (bench), Jed Stuart (bench), Chevy Stewart (bench), Jensen Taumoepeau (bench), Manaia Waitere (reserve), Myles Martin (reserve), Ethan Sanders (reserve), Jordan Martin (reserve), Noah Martin (reserve), Pasami Saulo (reserve), Utuloa Asomua (reserve)
In:
Corey Horsburgh (front row), Joseph Tapine (front row), Zac Hosking (second row), Owen Pattie (bench)
Changes:
Josh Papalii (front row to lock), Morgan Smithies (lock to bench), Simi Sasagi (reserve to bench), Ata Mariota (reserve to bench)

Warriors

Previous Game:
2025 Witzer NRL Pre-Season Challenge - Round 2 vs. Melbourne
Next Game:
Round 2 vs. Manly
Out:
Te Maire Martin (fullback), Eddie Ieremia-Toeava (centre), Bunty Afoa (front row), Tom Ale (bench), Edward Kosi (bench), Samuel Healey (bench), Freddy Lussick (reserve), Geronimo Doyle (reserve), Luke Hanson (reserve), Kalani Going (reserve), Moala Graham-Taufa (reserve), Sio Kali (reserve), Motu Pasikala (reserve), Jett Cleary (reserve)
In:
Charnze Nicoll-Klokstad (fullback), Adam Pompey (centre), James Fisher-Harris (front row), Mitchell Barnett (lock)
Changes:
Erin Clark (lock to bench)

This match is a part of the following:

  • 2025 Telstra NRL Premiership
  • 2025 Rugby League Las Vegas
